reviewCampaigns.title: Review campaigns
reviewCampaigns.subtitle: Evaluate agents with invited testers and reviewers.

dashboardCard.title: Review campaigns
dashboardCard.description: Invite testers and reviewers to evaluate an agent.

empty.title: No review campaigns yet
empty.description: Create a campaign to invite testers and reviewers to evaluate an agent.

editor.createDescription: Configure the agent, questions, and invitees before activating.
editor.noticeSaveFirst: Save the campaign first — invitations send a real email and need a persisted campaign.
editor.noticeActivateFirst: Activate the campaign before inviting participants — otherwise invitees would accept and land on a campaign that doesn't yet appear in their list.

defaults.description: Evaluate the agent's answers and share your feedback.

q2.prompt: Did the agent address your question?

q1.prompt: Were the agent's answers factually correct?

perSession.label: Tester — per-session questions
perSession.description: Asked after every session the tester completes.

endOfPhase.label: Tester — end-of-phase questions
endOfPhase.description: Asked once when the tester finishes participating.

reviewer.label: Reviewer questions
reviewer.description: Shown to reviewers while reviewing a session.

questions.factualTooltip: Factual questions (what happened in the session) stay visible to reviewers during blind review. Opinion questions are hidden until the reviewer submits their own review.

preview.perSessionDescription: What a tester sees when closing a session.
preview.endOfPhaseDescription: What a tester sees when they finish participating.

summary.pending: Aggregated results become available once the campaign is closed.
summary.meanTesterRatingHint: Average of the per-session overall ratings.
summary.endOfPhaseSurveysHint: Testers who submitted the final survey.

activate.title: Activate “{{name}}”?
activate.description: Once activated, the configuration (agent, questions) is locked and the campaign is visible to invited testers and reviewers. You can still invite more participants.

close.title: Close “{{name}}”?
close.description: Closing a campaign freezes all tester feedback and reviewer reviews. Participants will no longer be able to submit new sessions, feedback, or surveys. This cannot be undone.

delete.title: Delete “{{name}}”?
delete.description: This permanently deletes the draft campaign and its configuration. Only drafts can be deleted — active or closed campaigns must be kept for audit.

testerEndOfPhase.title: Tester — end-of-phase questions
testerEndOfPhase.description: One response per tester who completed the final survey.

reviewer.title: Reviewer questions
reviewer.description: One response per reviewer review across all sessions.

sessionMatrix.title: Session matrix
sessionMatrix.description: Per-session tester vs. reviewer ratings. Spread is the difference between the lowest and highest reviewer rating — high spread suggests reviewer disagreement.
sessionMatrix.emptyDescription: The session matrix fills in as testers start sessions in this campaign.

distribution.freeTextNotice: Free-text answers aren't summarized here — review individual sessions to read them.
